audit_items.proof_trace: All three eligibility conditions are structurally enforced by the compound branch in checkUpkeep: isPriceValid is guaranteed by the `else if (isPriceValid)` guard at L255; auctionStart==0 is guaranteed because the eligible path is the `else` branch of `if (auctionStart != 0)` at L246; and usdValue>=minAuctionSizeUsd is enforced by the explicit check at L261 before the single `eligibleAssets` push at L264. performUpkeep independently re-validates all three conditions as a defense-in-depth layer.
